companies_scores_valid.name: companies_scores_valid
companies_scores_valid.value: "companies"."growth_rate_bps" BETWEEN -10000 AND 100000 AND "companies"."brand_value" >= 0 AND "companies"."technology_score" BETWEEN 0 AND 1000 AND "companies"."risk_score" BETWEEN 0 AND 1000 AND "companies"."dividend_rate_bps" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000

leverage_positions_values_valid.name: leverage_positions_values_valid
leverage_positions_values_valid.value: "leverage_positions"."leverage" IN (1,2,3,5,10,20,50,100) AND "leverage_positions"."quantity" > 0 AND "leverage_positions"."margin" > 0 AND "leverage_positions"."position_size" > 0 AND "leverage_positions"."entry_price" > 0 AND "leverage_positions"."liquidation_price" > 0 AND "leverage_positions"."maintenance_margin_bps" BETWEEN 0 AND 9999 AND "leverage_positions"."open_fee" >= 0 AND "leverage_positions"."accrued_borrow_fee" >= 0

market_makers_config_valid.name: market_makers_config_valid
market_makers_config_valid.value: "market_makers"."base_spread_bps" > 0 AND "market_makers"."base_spread_bps" < 5000 AND "market_makers"."order_depth" BETWEEN 1 AND 20 AND "market_makers"."refresh_interval_ms" BETWEEN 1000 AND 3600000 AND "market_makers"."risk_aversion_bps" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000

mna_campaign_values_valid.name: mna_campaign_values_valid
mna_campaign_values_valid.value: "mna_campaigns"."offer_price" > 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."committed_cash" > 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."spent_cash" >= 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."spent_cash" <= "mna_campaigns"."committed_cash" AND "mna_campaigns"."attacker_asset_snapshot" >= 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."attacker_ownership_snapshot" >= 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."defender_ownership_snapshot" >= 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."attacker_score" >= 0 AND "mna_campaigns"."defender_score" >= 0

orders_prices_valid.name: orders_prices_valid
orders_prices_valid.value: ("orders"."limit_price" IS NULL OR "orders"."limit_price" > 0) AND ("orders"."stop_price" IS NULL OR "orders"."stop_price" > 0)

short_squeeze_metrics_valid.name: short_squeeze_metrics_valid
short_squeeze_metrics_valid.value: "short_squeeze_events"."utilization_bps" BETWEEN 0 AND 10000 AND "short_squeeze_events"."buy_volume" >= 0 AND "short_squeeze_events"."sell_volume" >= 0 AND "short_squeeze_events"."ask_depth" >= 0 AND "short_squeeze_events"."liquidation_count" >= 0
